name: ContextOS Prefetch
description: Fetches structured project context from ContextOS before every Kiro task. Injects architecture decisions, domain models, and current sprint context automatically.

then.prompt: Before starting this task, retrieve relevant project context from ContextOS. Call: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/context -H "Authorization: Bearer $CONTEXTOS_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"query\": \"{{task}}\", \"project\": \"{{project}}\", \"max_tokens\": 4000}". Use the returned context block to inform your implementation. If the server is not running, proceed without it.
